question:
Will the price of Ethereum be above $3,100 on November 26?

Description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for ETH/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

NFTs exploded, DeFi TVL surged past $100 billion, and the London hard fork in August introduced EIP-1559, burning a portion of every transaction fee and making ETH deflationary during high activity. ETH hit an all-time high of $4,815 on November 9 and closed the year near $3,680. 2022: A brutal unwinding. Terra/LUNA collapsed in May, triggering contagion that took down Three Arrows Capital and FTX. Despite the market destruction, Ethereum completed its most significant upgrade: The Merge on September 15, transitioning to Proof-of-Stake and cutting energy use by ~99.95%. evidences.title: Simple Green/Red Candle Trading Strategy for Cryptocurrency
evidences.content: What Is the Green/Red Candle Strategy? The Green/Red Candle Strategy uses the color of candlesticks on a 1-hour (H1) or 15-minute (M15) chart to determine whether to buy or sell. It’s designed for cryptocurrency pairs with strong liquidity and volatility, such as BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, or BNB/USDT, and can be implemented on platforms like Binance, Bybit, or KuCoin. Traders select three daily trading times based on their local time zone, aligning with active market sessions (Asian, European, and U.S.) to maximize opportunities. Key Features Instruments: Crypto pairs like BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, BNB/USDT. Trading Times: Three daily times in your local time zone, aligned with: Asian Session: Early morning (e.g., 08:00-10:00 local time). [...] Candle: H1 closes green (+$200) Action: Buy at $60,000 SL: $59,800 (low of prior candle, $200 risk) TP: $60,400 (1:2 ratio, $400 profit) Outcome: Price hits $60,400, yielding profit; or hits $59,800, incurring a small loss. Trade 2: ETH/USDT (H1, Afternoon Session) Location: London, UK (12:00 BST) Candle: H1 closes red (-$150) Action: Short at $59,500 SL: $59,650 (high of prior candle, $150 risk) TP: $59,200 (1:2 ratio, $300 profit) Outcome: Price dr...

evidences.title: Secret weapon "Mastering Time Zones"
evidences.content: ## 🔥 The Golden Overlaps: Where Magic Happens Time zone overlaps are where liquidity and volatility collide, creating prime trading windows. Here’s how to ride them on Binance: ### 1. Tokyo-London Overlap (UTC 08:00–10:00) 🇯🇵🇬🇧 What’s Happening? Asian traders hand off to Europe, creating a moderate-volume sweet spot. Why It’s Lit: Early Asian trends solidify or reverse as European liquidity kicks in. Perfect for catching momentum. Binance Play: Use Binance Spot for quick scalps on ETH/USDT or BNB/USDT. Check Binance Square for crossover sentiment. Example: A breakout above a key resistance on ADA/USDT at UTC 09:00 could signal a trend. Enter with a tight stop via Binance’s OCO orders. ### 2. London-New York Overlap (UTC 13:00–16:00) 🇬🇧🇺🇸 [...] ### 1. Asian Session (UTC 00:00–08:00) 🌸 Who’s Trading? Japan, South Korea, China, and Southeast Asia dominate. Think Binance’s massive APAC user base. What’s Hot? Pairs like BTC/JPY, ETH/USDT, and BNB/USDT see heavy action. Altcoins often pump first here. Why It Matters: Asian markets often set the daily trend. News like China’s regulatory moves or South Korea’s exchange hacks can spark wild volatility. Pro Tip: Follow Binance Square for...

evidences.title: Timezone — المؤشرات والاستراتيجيات — TradingView
evidences.content: for BTC/USDT on Binance, use UTC+0 times). Manual (Pro): Uncheck Use Exchange Timezone. Enter your UTC Offset (e.g., +2 for Berlin). evidences.title: Crypto Market Hours: Open & Close Crypto Trading Hours / Axi
evidences.content: ## When is the best time of day for crypto trading? Generally speaking, the best time to trade crypto is when global market trading activity is the highest. That means when the US market opens, which is the afternoon European time. Data from Skew confirms this notion, having found that 10 AM to 11 AM Eastern Standard Time is the most active period on Coinbase, a leading global crypto exchange. ## When is the most volatile time for cryptocurrency? According to an analysis conducted by Forbes, the most volatile periods for several cryptocurrencies pointed to Wednesday at 4 PM UTC. The study focused on four leading crypto exchanges: Coinbase, Gemini, Kraken, and Binance. 4 PM UTC corresponds to midday in the US, which is just shy of noon when stock market trading activity is heavy. evidences.title: The Best Times to Trade Cryptocurrency: A Comprehensive Guide
evidences.content: The U.S. session is often the most volatile due to its overlap with both European and Asian markets at different times. This period sees high liquidity and frequent price movements. For U.S.-based traders, early mornings (8:00 AM - 12:00 PM EST) are particularly advantageous as they coincide with European activity. Similarly, late afternoons (2:30 PM - 4:30 PM UTC) during the overlap of London and New York markets are prime trading hours globally. ### Best Days of the Week to Trade Crypto While cryptocurrency markets never close, trading activity fluctuates throughout the week: #### Monday: Often quieter as markets "wake up" from the weekend. This can be a good time for low-volatility trades. #### Tuesday to Thursday: [...] ### Optimal Trading Hours Certain periods in a 24-hour cycle are more favorable for crypto trading due to increased market activity and liquidity. These periods often align with overlaps between major financial markets: #### Asian Session (12:00 AM - 7:00 AM UTC): This session marks the opening of major Asian exchanges like Binance and Huobi. It’s characterized by moderate volatility and is ideal for traders focusing on cryptocurrencies popular in Asia. ####...

evidences.title: What time does the bitcoin market close? The day begins at - Binance
evidences.content: Image 1: Binance Square Login Sign Up DiscoverNewsNotificationProfileBookmarksChatsHistoryCreator CenterSettings Post Image 2 Zachmoon May 29, 2024 Follow Report Block User What time does the bitcoin market close? The day begins at midnight 00:00:00 and ends at 23:59:59 UTC, if the question is asked at the close of the “daily” candle. He also asks, What is a “Daily Close” in Cryptocurrency Trading? Although trading takes place throughout the hours of the day, the way traders measure cryptocurrency performance is through a daily 24-hour time frame, this is the “daily close.” At the end of a full day of trading (12:00 UTC), traders compare the price of a cryptocurrency with its price exactly 24 hours earlier. What are the peak hours for Bitcoin trading? [...] What are the peak hours for Bitcoin trading? Market Time Conversion Peak trading hours for the market are generally 8am to 4pm local time. These are the trading hours when trading volume in each region is usually the strongest. How much is 1 bitcoin worth? What time of day are cryptocurrency prices lowest?
